DescribeAlarmPolicies.policyName: Filter by policy name, supports partial match
DescribeAlarmPolicies.policyId: Filter by policy ID, exact match
DescribeAlarmPolicies.resourceType: Filter by resource type (scope must not be empty)
DescribeAlarmPolicies.recursive: Whether to include sub-types, default: false
DescribeAlarmPolicies.type: Filter by policy type, valid values: APP / SITE / CLOUD / CUSTOM
DescribeAlarmPolicies.order: Sort order, default: desc, valid values: desc / asc
DescribeAlarmPolicies.orderBy: Sort field, default: updatedTime, valid values: updatedTime / createdTime
